title: The Simp - 舔狗
description:
"He's different."



"Just like him."



This is what you would expect, but is it really the case? All the difficulties and obstacles do not matter to you, just want to go through the maze to see him! But what about the labyrinth in your mind?



---------



This is a super super hardcore horror puzzle game. The player plays a simple and weak girl in the game, the girl needs to carefully observe the interactive items in the environment, and reasonable interaction, to achieve the escape of the secret room and the maze through, while avoiding the unknown existence of damage. Depending on the player's choices, there will be different endings.
description_short: A super super hardcore puzzle horror game. The player needs to carefully observe the interactive items in the scene and deduce how to crack them. Wisdom, patience, operation and courage are indispensable! Are you ready to embark on the difficult but self-inspiring road of simp for your loved ones?
